data_flows.sync: Action-based Queue (src/stores/sync/queueProcessor.js) -> IndexedDB -> PocketBase REST. Atomicity per-item.
data_flows.rbac: Backend enforcement for SuperAdmin role on critical hooks (modules). Frontend route guards.
data_flows.gis: Stores load GeoJSON -> GisMapComponent parses manually (imperative Leaflet) -> DrawnItems
data_flows.signatures: Bitacora data -> digitalSignature.js (WebCrypto RSA-PSS) -> base64 stored in PocketBase
data_flows.ia_assistant: Frontend UI -> Backend Proxy (/api/ai/chat) -> OpenRouter. Structured JSON response allows action execution (Human-in-the-loop).
data_flows.bitacora_execution: UI Modo A -> Bitacora POST -> Finalize Programacion PATCH -> Recalculate 'proxima_ejecucion' locally then sync.

security_audit.authorization: Verified. Backend hooks enforce roles. Proxy endpoints protect 3P keys. Missing some deep filters for tenant isolation in Analytics/Users.

vulnerabilities.description: Operators can potentially perform actions ignoring quotas if UI doesn't reactively block them (Plan Store P6).

remediations.fix: Moved to Backend Proxy /api/alerts/send. Frontend keys removed.
Enforced superadmin role check in pb_hooks/main.js.

critical_flows_status.checkout_suscripciones: 🟡 Parcial. Enforced at backend level, but misses proper Stripe/payment gateway transaction rollback (financial atomicity).
critical_flows_status.sincronizacion_offline: ✅ Listo Producción. Robust. Race conditions fixed with isProcessing lock and atomic persistence.
critical_flows_status.asistente_ia: ✅ Listo Producción. End-to-end functionality complete with secure proxy and structured actions.
critical_flows_status.auditoria_bpa: ✅ Listo Producción. Checklists and Modos A/B functioning perfectly with RSA digital signatures.
critical_flows_status.alertas_y_recordatorios: ❌ No Implementado (Completamente). Backend exists for saving rules, but chronjobs or external push API (APNs/FCM/Email triggers) missing actual linkage.
critical_flows_status.finanzas: 🟡 Parcial. CRUD available but SRI invoicing compliance, taxation formats, and linkages with crops harvest exist as stubs.
